title: Lilly the Witch: The Dragon and the Magic Book
original_title: Hexe Lilli - Der Drache und das magische Buch
overview: Lilly was a normal girl with a healthy sense of adventure. That is, until she finds a magical book, complete with a funny little dragon, "Hector". With the help of her new friend and the book, Lilly has the ability to time-travel and truly satisfy her adventure- lust!.
